ddls:
CREATE TABLE "home_sizes" (
  "home_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home size */,
  "home_size" TEXT /* Description of the home size (e.g., Studio, 1 Bedroom) */,
  "avg_total_cost" REAL /* Average total cost for the home size */,
  "cost_per_hour" REAL /* Cost per hour for the home size */,
  "num_movers" INTEGER /* Number of movers required for the home size */,
  "num_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours required for the home size */,
  "sq_footage" REAL /* Square footage of the home size */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the home size */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the home size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_types" (
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move type */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Name of the move type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move type */,
  "distance_threshold" REAL /* Distance threshold for the move type (in miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movers" (
  "mover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mover */,
  "mover_name" TEXT /* Full name of the mover */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the mover */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the mover */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the mover (e.g., available days and hours) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the mover (in years) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the mover (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle in cubic feet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., dollies, blankets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who booked the move */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move type (e.g., local, long-distance) */,
  "home_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home size */,
  "move_date" TEXT /* Date of the move */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the move (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the move */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_home_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_size_id") REFERENCES home_sizes ("home_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("move_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_details" (
  "move_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move detail */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "mover_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mover assigned to the move */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the move */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment assigned to the move */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the move */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_details_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_details_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_details_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_details_mover_id FOREIGN KEY ("mover_id") REFERENCES movers ("mover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments left by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date of the invoice */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, cancelled) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the move (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_status_history_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_usage" (
  "equipment_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment usage */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
